object_a.label: lamp
object_a.description: Table lamp on small side table next to left sofa
object_a.long_form_open_description: Traditional table lamp with light-colored shade sitting on a small wooden side table between the sofa and the hallway entrance. Lamp shade appears white/cream and is turned on, casting warm light on the nearby wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: On a side table immediately adjacent to the left couch; near a small potted plant.

object_b.long_form_open_description: Traditional table lamp with a cream/white fabric shade and a base in brass or ceramic finish; currently turned on providing warm localized light near the right seating area.
